user.title: Connect EvolvIOT
user.description: Home Assistant could not start EvolvIOT pairing. Check the EvolvIOT backend connection and retry.

pair.title: Approve in the EvolvIOT app
pair.description: Pairing code: `{user_code}` Scan the QR code in the EvolvIOT app. After the app shows success, select Submit.

progress.pair: Waiting for approval in the EvolvIOT app. Pairing code: {user_code}

error.authorization_denied: Pairing was denied in the EvolvIOT app.
error.authorization_expired: The previous pairing session expired. A new QR code and pairing code have been generated.
error.authorization_pending: Pairing is not approved yet. Scan the QR code or enter the pairing code in the EvolvIOT app, then submit again.

abort.already_configured: This EvolvIOT account is already configured.
